zh.Field Dalling, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可菲爾德 達林
zh.lifeSummary: Aveline de Hesdin於大約1100年出生。她於1130年與Sir James Harcourt de St Claire在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭諾福爾可菲爾德 達林，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Aveline de Hesdin于大约1100年出生。她于1130年与Sir James Harcourt de St Claire在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰諾福爾可菲爾德 達林，埋葬在法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hesdin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Longford and Leitrim): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEislin, a shortened form of the older Ó hEisleanáin ‘descendant of Eisleanán’, a byname probably derived from éislinn ‘unsafe, weak’.

English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Alselin, from ancient Germanic Anselin, with assimilatory change of n to the following -l-. This is a French form of ancient Germanic Ans(e)helm, composed of the elements ans- ‘(pagan) god’ and helm- ‘helmet’; compare Anselm .
English: topographic name for a dweller ‘(by the) hazel copse’, from Old English hæsling, or a habitational name from any of various minor places called with this word.

variants.name: Henslin
meanings: Irish: possibly a variant of   Heslin  .
South German: from a pet form of   Hensel   (see   Hans  ).

variants.name: Anselm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Heinz.

English and German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Anshelm, composed of the elements ans- ‘god’ + helm ‘protection, helmet’. The personal name was taken to France and England by St. Anselm (c. 1033–1109), known as the Father of Scholasticism. He was born in Aosta, Italy, joined the Benedictine order at Bec in Normandy, France, and in 1093 became archbishop of Canterbury, England.

nameMeanings.name: Aveline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It seems to represent an Old French pet form of the Germanic name   Avila   (a derivative of   Avis  ), but it could also be an elaborated form of   Ava .

en.lifeSummary: Aveline de Hesdin was born about 1100. She married Sir James Harcourt de St Claire in 1130, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in Field Dalling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Aveline de Hesdin est née environ 1100. Elle a épousé Sir James Harcourt de St Claire en 1130, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Field Dalling, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, France.

ja.lifeSummary: Aveline de Hesdinは約1100年に生まれた。1130年にイギリスノーフォルクでSir James Harcourt de St Claireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノーフォルクフィールド ダリングで死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aveline de Hesdin(은)는 대략 1100년 태어났다. 그녀는 1130년 영국 노르폴크에서 Sir James Harcourt de St Claire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 필드 댈링에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Aveline de Hesdin nasceu aproximadamente 1100. Ela casou-se com Sir James Harcourt de St Claire em 1130, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Field Dalling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Aveline de Hesdin родилась около 1100 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Harcourt de St Claire в 1130 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности фиелд даллинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности харкоурт, эур, норманди, Франция.
